name: Head and Neck CT Without Contrast
description: Standard head and neck CT report template without contrast for evaluation of soft tissues and bones

findings.technique: CT of the head and neck was performed from the skull base through the suprasternal fossa without contrast.
findings.comparison: No prior imaging available for comparison.

sections.name: Orbits
sections.content: Orbits: Globes are [intact / show no abnormal opacity]. Extraocular muscles are [normal / enlarged]. Optic nerves are [normal / abnormal].

sections.name: Paranasal Sinuses
sections.content:
Maxillary sinuses: [clear / fluid / mucosal thickening] bilaterally.
Ethmoid sinuses: [clear / fluid / mucosal thickening].
Frontal sinuses: [clear / fluid / mucosal thickening].
Sphenoid sinus: [clear / fluid / mucosal thickening].

sections.name: Nasopharynx
sections.content: Nasopharyngeal soft tissues [are unremarkable / show asymmetric thickening]. No mass is identified.

sections.name: Oral Cavity
sections.content: The oral cavity and tongue [are unremarkable / show]. No abnormal mass or collection identified.

sections.name: Larynx
sections.content: Laryngeal structures [are unremarkable / show]. Vocal cords [are mobile / show decreased mobility]. No airway compromise.

sections.name: Neck Soft Tissues
sections.content: Neck soft tissues [show no abnormal lymphadenopathy / are unremarkable]. No mass or collection identified.

sections.name: Cervical Lymph Nodes
sections.content: No pathologically enlarged cervical lymph nodes identified.

impression:
1. [No acute abnormality / Sinusitis] identified.
2. [No evidence of mass or lymphadenopathy / Recommend clinical correlation if clinically indicated].
author: RadReport Templates
